self_answered_questions.q1_accounts: ANSWERED — Gumroad and Etsy already exist. Blocker removed.
self_answered_questions.q2_template_structure: Decided: Model it on Jason's ACTUAL CSV structure. I have his real portfolio data — I know exactly what columns he tracks. Symbols, description, sector, qty, price, market value, cost basis, cost/share, day change, gain/loss %, gain/loss $, % of account, dividend yield, dividend pay date. This is more authentic than any generic template.
self_answered_questions.q3_affiliate_niche: Decided: Trading/investing tools. No further discussion needed.
self_answered_questions.q4_bandwidth: Assumed: Minimal this week. We build everything, Jason just publishes when ready.

D1_notion_template.location: Will be delivered as a structured markdown/description that Jason duplicates into Notion, OR as a direct Notion template link
D1_notion_template.structure: Based on actual CSV columns from Jason's Fidelity exports
sections: Dashboard: Account summary (Individual, Rollover IRA, total)
Positions DB: Symbol, Description, Sector, Qty, Price, Mkt Value, Cost Basis, Cost/Share, Gain/Loss %, Gain/Loss $, % of Account, Div Yield, Asset Type
Thesis Notes: Per-position thesis, entry rationale, exit targets, stop levels
Realized Gains Log: Symbol, Open/Close dates, Proceeds, Cost Basis, G/L, Term
Watchlist: Tickers being stalked, target entry price, thesis
Sector Allocation View: Grouped by sector with totals
Macro Dashboard: Key indicators being tracked (oil, gold, DXY, etc.)

D2_gumroad_listing.deliverable: Complete product listing copy — title, description, tags, pricing

D3_competitor_research.deliverable: Top 5 Notion portfolio trackers on Gumroad/Etsy with pricing and feature gaps

D4_affiliate_article_outline.deliverable: Article 1 outline: 'Best Portfolio Tracking Tools for Active Traders (2026)'

Write 3 affiliate article outlines with keyword targets → shared/streams/affiliate-marketing-saas/article-outlines.md
Review my Notion template structure (above) and flag anything missing or wrong
Draft the Gumroad product description if you think you can write stronger copy than me
Write a Reddit post draft for r/Notion and r/investing that introduces the template without being spammy
